display.purpose: Rare Storefront statements and primary route titles.

body.purpose: Mongolian prose, instructions, and supporting commercial copy.

label.purpose: Controls, prices, status, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, popovers, and Cart sheets only.

shadows.name: sticky-action
shadows.purpose: Mobile action bars that separate from scrolling content.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Responsive state entry and direct-manipulation feedback.

motion.name: duration-feedback
motion.purpose: Pointer press, color, and short control feedback.

motion.name: duration-local
motion.purpose: Occasional drawers, sheets, and local continuity.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action in a commerce region.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 18px; background: oklch(58% 0.16 38); color: oklch(98% 0.01 75); font: 700 13px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 160ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), filter 160ms ease; } .ds-button-primary:hover { filter: brightness(.96); } .ds-button-primary:active { transform: scale(.97); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Quiet Button
components.description: Secondary action without competing accent fill.
components.css: .ds-button-quiet { min-height: 44px; border: 0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 18px; background: oklch(92% 0.035 78); color: oklch(24% 0.025 66); font: 700 13px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-button-quiet:hover { filter: brightness(.97); } .ds-button-quiet:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: A conventional, full-width Store search field.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 7px; color: oklch(24% 0.025 66); font: 700 13px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { min-height: 48px; border: 1px solid oklch(48% 0.02 66 / 35%); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; background: oklch(97% 0.018 85); color: oklch(24% 0.025 66); font: 400 16px/1.5 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Availability Status
components.description: Text-first state with a redundant visual marker.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; border-radius: 999px; padding: 8px 12px; background: oklch(92% 0.035 78); color: oklch(24% 0.025 66); font: 700 13px/1.3 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-status > span { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(57% 0.13 135); }

components.name: Store Navigation
components.description: Text-led navigation with a conventional active state.
components.html: ДэлгүүрТүүх
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; gap: 24px; font: 600 14px/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav a { color: oklch(24% 0.025 66); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: transparent; text-underline-offset: 6px; } .ds-nav a:hover, .ds-nav a[aria-current=page] { text-decoration-color: currentColor; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(54% 0.17 250); outline-offset: 3px; }

narrative.overview: The system gives each Store enough visual freedom to feel authored while keeping the act of buying immediately recognizable. Store identity may change composition, typography, imagery, density, color, and merchandising rhythm. The shared layer supplies accessible controls, state language, focus, spacing, responsive behavior, and motion restraint rather than a visible house theme.
keyCharacteristics: Product imagery and prices before decorative interface furniture.
Familiar conversion controls with expressive merchandising around them.
Strong keyboard, reflow, contrast, reduced-motion, and Mongolian-language behavior.

rules.name: The Shared Floor Rule
rules.body: A Store may replace the frame, never the buying semantics. Shared behavior, state meaning, focus, validation, pricing clarity, and accessibility are not brand variables.

rules.name: The Semantic Contrast Rule
rules.body: Brand color never weakens focus, error, disabled, availability, or text contrast. Every foreground/background pair must be validated, not assumed.

rules.name: The One Emphasis Rule
rules.body: Each region has one dominant action. Secondary actions use quieter surfaces or text treatment instead of competing accent fills.

rules.name: The Mongolian First Rule
rules.body: Never approve a typeface from Latin specimens alone. Check Ө, Ү, Ё, Й, punctuation, MNT figures, long labels, and dense mobile rows before adoption.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: A resting page is not a pile of floating cards. Add elevation only when an element actually overlays or moves independently from the document.

dos: Do adapt composition, typography, imagery, density, navigation presentation, and merchandising rhythm for each merchant.
Do keep Product names, MNT prices, Search, options, Cart, and Checkout entry familiar and visible.
Do render useful public content before client JavaScript and keep live commercial truth outside cached presentation.
Do validate every merchant palette against WCAG 2.2 AA, visible focus, 200% zoom, 320px reflow, and reduced motion.
Do use one purposeful motion response at a time, normally 120–220ms with a strong ease-out curve.
Do keep the shared Admin quieter and denser than expressive Storefront merchandising.
donts: Don't create generic Shopify-style theme sameness where identity is reduced to logo, color, and font swaps.
Don't create Shadcn-style card grids dressed up as commerce or nest cards to manufacture hierarchy.
Don't let art direction hide products, prices, search, or purchasing behind novelty.
Don't use gradient text, decorative glassmorphism, side-stripe accents, or repeated tiny uppercase eyebrows as default grammar.
Don't make every control a pill or every surface rounded and elevated.
Don't animate keyboard-initiated actions, delay input, or encode inventory/payment state in motion.
Don't introduce a Store-specific component override framework; reviewed route composition is the customization seam.
